center.name: 金湾
center.summary: 金湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-collared lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb The red-collared lorikeet is found across northern Australia, from King Sound in Western Australia to the Gulf of Carpentaria

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb The red-collared lorikeet is found across northern Australia, from King Sound in Western Australia to the Gulf of Carpentaria
